pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA TF-K-005 (TF, Knowledge) does not clear the moderate fit inclusion threshold of 0.43. Composite score 0.3843 is insufficient to establish relevance to clinical data management, regulatory compliance, and healthcare analytics at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (nist_ai_rmf=0.384, dcwf=0.380, eu_ai_act=0.377) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude upheld. Score 0.3843 below threshold for moderate fit domain. No internal inconsistencies identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Composite 0.3843 for TF domain does not meet the evidentiary bar for ANL IC-level inclusion per O*NET 15-2051.00 tools/technology section; DCWF technical foundations competencies for analytics work roles. External sources confirm this competency is not a standard expectation for Clinical Data Manager at the targeted seniority band.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms TF domain KSA at composite 0.3843 is not a standard requirement for Clinical Data Manager at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: exclude. P2 exclude confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.3843, domain TF, scope moderate fit. High confidence.
